name: Vegetable Platter
recipeIngredient: 1 large head of Boston or other soft lettuce, separated into individual leaves
1 bunch of scallions, cut into 2-inch lengths
1 cup fresh Asian basil or regular basil leaves
1 cucumber, peeled into alternating strips and halved lengthwise, then sliced thinly crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1 On a large platter, decoratively arrange all of the ingredients in separate groups.
2 Use these vegetables and herbs as desired in recipes.
3 This vegetable platter is a staple in Vietnamese cuisine, often served alongside grilled dishes.
4 The fresh lettuce, herbs, unripe fruits, and raw vegetables are key components that make Vietnamese meals so light and refreshing.
5 Consider adding authentic Vietnamese herbs like saw leaf herb (Eryngium foetidium or ngo gai) and polygonum (P. pulchrum or rau ram) if available at Southeast Asian markets.
6 If you have access to unripe mango, banana, papaya, apple, or star fruit (carambola), add them to the platter for extra flavor and variety.
7 Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
From "The Foods of Vietnam" by Nicole Rauthier. Stewart, Tabori & Chang. 1989.
